enabled.name: Auto Brightness Enabled
enabled.description: 启用基于环境光传感器的自动亮度调节

sensitivity.name: Auto Brightness Sensitivity
sensitivity.description: 自动亮度调节的敏感度，值越大时调整范围越大

change-threshold.name: Light Change Threshold
change-threshold.description: 触发亮度调节的环境光变化阈值

brightness-change-threshold.name: Brightness Change Threshold
brightness-change-threshold.description: 触发亮度调节的亮度变化阈值（0.01表示1%）

manual-override-duration.name: Manual Override Duration
manual-override-duration.description: 手动调节后暂停自动调节的时长（秒）

manual-adjust-disables-auto-mode.name: Manual Adjust Disables Auto Mode
manual-adjust-disables-auto-mode.description: 手动调节是否禁用自动模式

kalman-process-noise.name: Kalman Filter Process Noise Q
kalman-process-noise.description: 卡尔曼滤波器过程噪声协方差（Q），值越大对环境光变化响应越快

kalman-measurement-noise.name: Kalman Filter Measurement Noise R
kalman-measurement-noise.description: 卡尔曼滤波器测量噪声协方差（R），值越大滤波效果越强

use-transition.name: Use Transition for Auto Brightness
use-transition.description: 自动亮度调节时是否使用渐变效果（即使全局渐变功能关闭）

lux-brightness-curve.name: Lux to Brightness Curve
lux-brightness-curve.description: 环境光到亮度的映射曲线配置

kalman-window-size.name: Kalman Filter Window Size
kalman-window-size.description: 自适应卡尔曼滤波器滑动窗口大小，用于计算测量方差
